sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: How Earnings Momentum and Fortune Recognition Could Reshape the Royal Caribbean (RCL) Investment Narrative
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group (RCL) is attracting attention ahead of its January 29, 2026, earnings release, which is expected to show higher EPS and revenue. The company's inclusion in Fortune's "World's Most Admired Companies" list and its ongoing expansion reinforce its position as a global vacation leader, strengthening the existing bull case. Investors are now keen to see how the company performs on margins, pricing, and booking trends, while also keeping an eye on its debt load.

feed.title: TD Cowen Maintains a Constructive View on U.S. Bancorp (USB)
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reiterated a Buy rating on U.S. Bancorp (USB) and raised its price target to $66 following strong Q4 2025 earnings which exceeded expectations. The firm noted upside surprises in net interest income and fees, alongside tight expense control. Additionally, U.S. Bancorp announced plans to acquire Wall Street brokerage BTIG for up to $1 billion, a strategic move to expand its capital markets presence and offer a more comprehensive suite of services, expected to add approximately $750 million in annual revenue.

feed.title: Up Just 8% In Last 12 Months, Can Deere & Company Stock Deliver Better in 2026?
feed.summary: Deere & Company (DE) delivered strong net income in fiscal 2025 despite a challenging agricultural downturn, showcasing resilience and a shift towards technology-driven agriculture. A financial model projects the stock could reach $655 by October 2028, representing a 27% total return from its current price, driven by anticipated recovery in large agriculture, growth in other segments, and increasing adoption of precision technology like See & Spray. The valuation relies on assumptions of 7.4% annual revenue growth, 15.8% operating margins, and a 25x price-to-earnings multiple, acknowledging cyclical headwinds while emphasizing structural improvements.

feed.title: BofA Sees Stronger Fee Outlook Supporting BlackRock, Inc. (BLK)'s Longer-Term Earnings Path
feed.summary: BofA has raised its price target for BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE:BLK) to $1,467 from $1,431 and maintained a Buy rating, citing a stronger fee outlook. The firm also increased its EPS estimates for future years, primarily due to higher management and performance fee expectations. This positive outlook follows BlackRock's strong fourth-quarter profit, driven by market rallies, increased assets under management, and significant inflows into its ETF and fixed-income products.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) and CEPI Launch Effort to Make Ebola Vaccine Cheaper and Easier to Distribute
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. and the Coalition for Epidemic Preparedness Innovations (CEPI) have launched a $30 million program to develop a more affordable and easily distributable version of Merck's Ebola vaccine, Ervebo. This initiative aims to improve the manufacturing process, increase vaccine yield, extend shelf life, and enable storage in standard refrigerators, making it more accessible in low- and middle-income countries. Additionally, Merck has raised its revenue outlook for new growth drivers, anticipating $70 billion from newer businesses by the mid-2030s.

feed.title: FactSet Research: The Quiet Powerhouse Rewiring How Wall Street Actually Works
feed.summary: FactSet Research has evolved from a data terminal into a comprehensive analytics, workflow, and AI platform, becoming an essential operating system for modern investment and risk teams. It competes with major players like Bloomberg Terminal and Refinitiv Workspace by offering a unified, API-first environment that integrates data, analytics, and AI into financial workflows, driving operational efficiency and reducing technical debt for institutional clients. This integrated approach positions FactSet as a critical growth driver for its stock, appealing to firms seeking to simplify their tech stacks and enhance decision-making.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) and CEPI Launch Effort to Make Ebola Vaccine Cheaper and Easier to Distribute
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) and CEPI have partnered to launch a $30 million program aimed at making Merck's Ebola vaccine, Ervebo, cheaper and easier to distribute in low- and middle-income countries. This initiative will focus on improving manufacturing processes to increase yield, extend shelf life, and enable storage in standard refrigerators. Separately, Merck has raised its revenue outlook for new growth drivers, now expecting $70 billion from these businesses by the mid-2030s, with significant increases projected for cardiometabolic, respiratory, and infectious disease treatments.

feed.title: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (PNC) Enters 2026 With Momentum as Oppenheimer Highlights Growth Drivers
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has increased its price target for The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) to $284 from $268, maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm notes PNC's strong performance in late 2025, with organic growth expected to continue into 2026, further boosted by a January acquisition. PNC's fourth-quarter profits surpassed expectations, driven by a rebound in capital markets and advisory revenue due to increased dealmaking activity in 2025.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy Restores Power to Over 99% of Customers Amid Winter Storm
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy has successfully restored power to over 99% of its customers affected by a winter storm, with less than 2,000 still impacted. The company mobilized 3,300 workers and proactively prepared equipment like poles and transformers to facilitate rapid recovery. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for CNP, forecasting a potential rise in stock price over the next 12 months with an average price target of $41.80.

feed.title: Jabil Inc. (JBL) Announces $1 Billion Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has announced a strategic move to strengthen its financial position by issuing $1 billion in senior notes through a public offering. This includes $500 million of 4.200% Senior Notes due 2029 and $500 million of 4.750% Senior Notes due 2033. This offering aims to bolster the company's capital structure and provide flexibility for future growth initiatives, with Jabil retaining redemption options under specific conditions.

feed.title: Down 10% In Last 12 Months, Can Stryker Stock Finally Recover in 2026?
feed.summary: Stryker (SYK) demonstrated robust organic growth of 9.5% in Q3, marking its fourth consecutive year of roughly 10% organic expansion, driven by strong performance in Orthopaedics and high utilization of its Mako robotics platform. Despite a 10% stock decline over the past year, an analysis projects the stock could reach $431 by December 2027, offering a potential 21% return, or 11% annually, based on continued successful Mako installations, disciplined margin expansion, and steady revenue growth. The company is poised for recovery by leveraging its diverse segments, strategic M&A, and market leadership in surgical robotics.

feed.title: Will Diamondback Energy Raise Its Dividend Next Month? If So, FANG Stock Could Rise
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) is expected to announce its Q4 earnings on February 24th, and there's a strong possibility it will raise its dividend, potentially leading to a stock increase. Despite lower oil and gas prices in Q4, the company has a history of annual dividend hikes and prioritizes shareholder returns. Investors could also consider shorting out-of-the-money put options as an alternative strategy to generate monthly income.

feed.title: Houston freeze leaves 2,000 CenterPoint customers out; 3,300 restoring service
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy reported on its winter storm response in Greater Houston, noting that as of 6:00 AM on January 25, 2026, approximately 2,000 customers remained without power, representing less than 1% of its 2.9 million customers. The company mobilized an expanded workforce of 3,300 workers and has already restored power to about 27,000 customers since Saturday. CenterPoint emphasized its extensive preparations, including activating its Emergency Operations Center and staging significant equipment to mitigate storm impact and facilitate rapid restoration.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy Winter Storm Update: Over 99 percent of CenterPoint customers have power across Greater Houston area; Teams actively repairing weather-related damages and restoring power as soon as possible
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy reports that over 99% of its customers in the Greater Houston area have power despite the ongoing winter storm, with only about 2,000 customers currently affected. The company has deployed an expanded workforce of 3,300 to assess damage, repair equipment, and restore service, having already restored power to approximately 27,000 customers since Saturday. CenterPoint also emphasized safety reminders regarding downed power lines and detailed its extensive preparedness measures, including infrastructure inspections and critical care customer outreach.

feed.title: Motorola Solutions, Inc. $MSI Shares Sold by Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc.
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc. reduced its stake in Motorola Solutions (MSI) by 20.5% in the third quarter, selling 6,537 shares and retaining 25,278 shares valued at $11.45 million. Despite this, Motorola Solutions recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.21 per share and beat quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Wall Street analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for MSI with an average price target of $491.86.

feed.title: Fortinet Stock Rallies as TD Cowen Upgrade Spurs Optimism
feed.summary: Fortinet (FTNT) stock has rallied over 5% following an upgrade from TD Cowen, which changed its rating from hold to buy. This optimism is driven by strong fiscal performance, predicted Q4 revenue growth, and robust fundamentals including an 80.9% gross margin. The company's minimal exposure to China and advancements in SASE also contribute to a positive long-term outlook, despite a premium valuation.

feed.title: How Southwest’s Business Model Overhaul Will Impact Southwest Airlines (LUV) Investors
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines is undergoing a significant business model overhaul, introducing assigned seating, premium cabins, and hub-focused flying to address rising costs and investor concerns. This shift aims to align its offerings closer to traditional carriers while retaining unique perks, but its success hinges on effective execution and market reception. Investors are closely watching the upcoming earnings call and early results, given the wide range of fair value estimates for LUV stock.

feed.title: Hasbro names Nintendo, Honest Co. executives to its board - Bizwomen
feed.summary: Hasbro has appointed Carla Vernón, CEO of The Honest Co., and Doug Bowser, former president of Nintendo of America, to its board of directors. The toy company, which is relocating its headquarters to Boston, gains executives with extensive experience in consumer goods and the gaming industry. Vernón previously held leadership roles at Amazon and General Mills, while Bowser oversaw the launch of the Nintendo Switch and its expansion into new markets.
